slides.text: You said yes to me and traveled 10 hours back and forth just to meet me...
...and I know I made that very first meeting a bit awkward.
I didn't meet your expectations that day, and I'm so sorry for that.
But despite all that, you saw my innocence and still said yes to me.
You have loved me so much from day one, and I am so grateful for you.
I want to live this life with you, sharing all our highs and lows together.
Love you so much, my musk melon! 🍈❤️
Riya, let's make this official. Will you make me the happiest person and say Yes? 💖
